creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
From <https://forums.FreeBSD.org/threads/81417/>: 

> … Current "disc" images are for 900MB …

– so, also need to update the website and documentation with regard to CDs. 

(The Handbook currently states that -disc1.iso should be burned to a CD; and so on.)

----

<https://www.freebsd.org/where/#distribution> refers to <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/#mirrors>, which does not redirect to the required chapter. 

----

> <http://ftp-archive.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD-Archive/old-releases/> is currently unreachable.

It's now reachable.
